title: Community Trust Company successful in statutory appeal from Commissioner of the Financial Consumer Agency of Canada
content:
## Community Trust Company successful in statutory appeal from Commissioner of the Financial Consumer Agency of Canada
We assisted Community Trust Company ("CTC") with a statutory appeal from the Commissioner of the Financial Consumer Agency of Canada to the Federal Court, where CTC was successful in setting aside a C$1.6 million administrative monetary penalty, in reasons delivered on January 15, 2026.
CTC is a Canadian financial institution offering innovative and flexible solutions for home buyers, investors, and individuals seeking financial services.
McCarthy Tétrault assisted CTC with a team led by Brandon Kain that included Adam Kanji (Litigation).
